articles.title: Car carrying family of 3 pulled from Seekonk River in Rhode Island
articles.description:
The vehicle’s three occupants are believed to still be inside.

The post Car carrying family of 3 pulled from Seekonk River in Rhode Island appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rescue teams recovered a car from Seekonk River, Rhode Island, on June 29.
Three occupants, a family, are believed to still be inside the vehicle.
Local authorities are investigating the incident, raising safety concerns for nearby residents.
